data.title: Excellere Partners promotes Mark Sparrow to CFO and Jordan Day to Office Manager, strengthening financial infrastructure.
data.description: Excellere Partners, a prominent private equity firm known for its collaboration with entrepreneurs and management teams to create lasting value, has recently promoted Mark Sparrow to the position of Chief Financial Officer and Jordan Day as Office Manager. Since his arrival at Excellere in 2024, Sparrow has been a vital asset as a strategic ally to the firm's leadership, significantly contributing to enhancing Excellere's financial foundations and future planning. The appointment of Sparrow and Day marks a significant milestone in Excellere's growth trajectory, underscoring the firm's commitment to fostering talent from within.

data.title: Terrestrial Energy secures 2nd DOE agreement for TEFLA pilot plant, fueling IMSR Salt production.
data.description: The second OTA agreement between a company and the US Department of Energy (DOE) allows for fast-tracking the approval process for operating TEFLA, a pilot plant focused on IMSR Fuel Salt production. This agreement streamlines the pathway for authorization and collaboration between the company and the DOE to facilitate the production operations.

data.title: Fidelity D & D Bancorp declares 2026 Q1 dividend of $0.43/share, up 7.5% from prior year, payable on March 10.
data.description: In Dunmore, Pennsylvania, on January 22, 2026, the Board of Directors of Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FDBC), the parent company of The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank, has declared a first quarter dividend for 2026. The dividend amounts to $0.43 per share, marking a 7.5% rise from the previous year's first quarter dividend of $0.40 per share. Shareholders of record at the close of business on February 13, 2026, will receive the dividend, which is scheduled to be paid on March 10, 2026.

data.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust to release Q4 and full-year 2025 results on January 29, 2026, with a conference call at 6 PM ET. Webcast available at pmt.pennymac.com.
data.description: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2025, through a news release after market close on Thursday, January 29, 2026. A conference call and live audio webcast will be hosted by management at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss the outcomes. Interested individuals can access the release, webcast, and related materials on the website pmt.pennymac.com. For those unable to participate live, a replay of the webcast will be available shortly after.

data.title: David Weinhoffer, with 35 years experience in turnarounds, joins J.S. Held. Announcement made on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: David Weinhoffer has brought his expertise garnered from more than 35 years in business turnarounds, insolvency, and financial & operational advisory to assist clients of J.S. Held. In a recent announcement made on January 22, 2026, in New York, the global consulting firm welcomed Weinhoffer to its Strategic team.

data.title: Project LeanNation closes Breakout 2025 with strong momentum for 2026, focusing on scalable national expansion. (characters: 109)
data.description: Positioned for national expansion, Project LeanNation, based in Rochester, NY, announced disciplined growth, consumer innovation, and infrastructure investments as key factors. The technology-driven wellness brand is transforming community nutrition and weight management. The development aims to scale the brand nationally, projecting significant growth and impact.

data.title: Martus Solutions reports significant growth with high ARR gains, expanding customer base, and AI product innovation.81 characters.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina on January 22, 2026, Martus Solutions, a top budgeting and reporting platform for mission-focused organizations, revealed impressive growth figures for the year. The growth was primarily fueled by a rise in customer uptake, partner collaboration, and ongoing product enhancements.

data.title: Green Brick Partners, Inc. will release Q4 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, with an earnings call hosted by CEO Jim Brickman.
data.description: Plano, Texas-based Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK), recognized as the third largest homebuilder in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, and listed among Fortune Magazine’s fastest growing companies in 2024, will divulge its financial performance for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, following the market closure on February 25, 2026. CEO Jim Brickman will lead an earnings conference call to review the results at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time on Thursday.

data.title: Circle CEO dismisses fears of bank runs from stablecoin yields at WEF, cites money market funds and finance trends.
data.description: During the World Economic Forum, Jeremy Allaire, the CEO of Circle, dismissed concerns about stablecoin yields potentially causing bank runs. He highlighted examples like money market funds and significant changes in the finance sector to support his argument.

data.title: Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) named to Corporate Knights’ 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations in the World.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI), known for offering environmental solutions for industrial and specialty waste streams, disclosed its inclusion in Corporate Knights’ 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations in the World list. The announcement was made during the World Economic Forum held in Davos, Switzerland. This marks Enviri's debut on the Global 100 list, signifying its recognition as a top sustainable corporation worldwide.

data.title: Independent Bank Corp made $18.6M in Q4 2025 (EPS $0.89), $68.5M for 2025 (EPS $3.27). Board authorized 5% stock repurchase plan.
data.description: Independent Bank Corporation, based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $18.6 million, or $0.89 per diluted share, for this quarter, slightly higher than the $18.5 million, or $0.87 per diluted share, recorded in the same period the previous year. For the entire year ending on December 31, 2025, Independent Bank Corporation reported a net income of $68.5 million, or $3.27 per diluted share, showing an increase from the $66.8 million, or $3.16 per diluted share, reported in 2024.
Abacus Global Management to join conference soon.

data.title: Premier Air Charter buys Citation X, second major expansion, OTCID: PREM.
data.description: Today, OTCID: PREM disclosed the acquisition of a Citation X as part of its fleet, representing the company's second significant fleet expansion move in the past few months.

data.title: DIRTT had strong December commercial activity with customers shifting from planning to execution in healthcare, public sector, and workplace sectors.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 22, 2026, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. (referred to as "DIRTT" or "the Company") provided an update on its progress. As a notable player in industrialized construction, DIRTT (TSX: DRT; OTCQX: DRTTF) witnessed ongoing positive developments leading into the end of the year. The company reported a shift towards action as customers progressed from the planning phase to implementation. Notably, there was heightened activity in various sectors including healthcare, public services, and corporate workspaces, indicating a broad spectrum of engagement.

data.title: Catheter Precision gets first LockeT order in Germany from Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt, marking entry into German market.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Fort Mill, South Carolina, Catheter Precision, Inc. (VTAK - NYSE/American), a leading medical device company in the US specializing in advanced products for the cardiac electrophysiology sector, revealed the reception of a purchase order for their LockeT product from Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt (Frankfurt University Hospital). This development signifies LockeT's introduction into the German market, marking a significant milestone for the company.
